narrative:
Bethel Village B (precinct in Clermont County) has 864 registered voters, with 64.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a clear Republican lean of 11.5 percentage points.
